title: Trying to create some kind of custom export from Monday, unsure of my options
excerpt:
Hello, 
I am trying to create a custom export from monday so that my team doesn’t have to manually enter data from an item into a new excel document for every single job. We have hundreds of jobs and would be very effici…

posts.author: CHOCM (Christopher Herndon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am trying to create a custom export from monday so that my team doesn’t have to manually enter data from an item into a new excel document for every single job. We have hundreds of jobs and would be very efficient to create that excel Doc from monday with the data that already exists in the item.

posts.author: bradfoster (Brad Foster)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would checkout the export documentation here: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000219209-Import-export-with-Excel

If you need the item data exported in a more customized format for your use case you would most likely need a custom monday addon developed to pull the item data and manipulate it into the format/order you want in the excel file.

posts.author: Zaid_Nadeem (Zaid Nadeem)
posts.cookedHtml: That sound very efficient. you just need to update the administrations settings of your Monday account and select the export option. you can easily manage and export the data in few steps.
